posts.raw_content:
Who remembers September 2022 when there was talk of a Red Wave predicting majorities in both the House and the Senate until Sen. Graham completely out of the blue promoted the idea of a national 15 week abortion ban. The media was more than happy to have him on their broadcasts almost 24/7 fracturing the GOP message and leading to less than stellar results in November. 

Some how years have passed since that date and the good Senator never seemed to find the time to introduce this “critical” bill that he promised to introduce on “Day 1” of the next Congress.

While I’ll never celebrate the death of another, I’m grateful that Sen. Graham won’t be around to spring another September Surprise this fall.
